Checklist Item: Semantic-to-div ratio above threshold; pages with >70% generic containers (div/span) flagged
Comments: EDS block model and heavy createElement('div') usage (90+ files, 500+ div wrappers) dominate over semantic elements; authored page HTML is table-to-div structure. Repo source tag ratio ~43% div but runtime pages exceed 70% generic containers.

Checklist Item: Correct heading hierarchy maintained
Comments: No site-wide heading hierarchy validation; blocks manipulate headings independently (hero normalizes to h1, location injects h4, tabs strip heading semantics). Authors control levels via content with no skip-level checks.

Checklist Item: Single h1 per page where applicable
Comments: Multiple blocks programmatically create h1 (hero, hero-homepage, overview, media-module); no guard prevents multiple h1 on one page when several blocks are authored.

Checklist Item: DOM source order matches visual tab order; no positive tabindex values; CSS order/flex-direction does not contradict DOM sequence
Comments: tabindex=0 applied to non-interactive header dropdown/heading elements; flex-direction:row-reverse used in styles.css and header.css which can invert visual vs DOM tab order.

Checklist Item: Page content hierarchy intact: headings and body text present in raw HTML source; critical content not injected solely via JavaScript; no content exclusively hidden via inline style or JS-only class toggling
Comments: EDS loads page markup via fetch/fragment JS; body hidden until .appear class; blocks restructure DOM and move content via innerHTML. Critical text not guaranteed in initial HTML source.

Checklist Item: Avoid excessive DOM depth
Comments: Complex blocks (overview, header, contact-details) nest many wrapper divs via createElement chains, exceeding reasonable depth for EDS table-to-div structure.

Checklist Item: Radio/checkbox groups wrapped in fieldset with legend; forms with 3+ related inputs have grouping
Comments: Adaptive Form blocks wrap radio/checkbox groups in fieldset with legend; wizard/accordion panels use nested fieldsets per form.css and form.js.

Checklist Item: All inputs have associated labels
Comments: Form util createLabel() generates label/legend elements with for/id association for inputs in blocks/form.

Checklist Item: Placeholder not used as label
Comments: Form models and util.js set placeholder attribute on inputs; placeholders can supplement but are not prevented from substituting visible labels.

Checklist Item: Error messages programmatically associated with inputs via aria-describedby or aria-errormessage; error containers use role='alert' or aria-live='assertive'; error text is non-empty and >10 characters
Comments: Only aria-describedby used for field descriptions; no aria-errormessage, role=alert, or aria-live=assertive found for validation error containers.

Checklist Item: Avoid inline styles
Comments: Inline style attributes used in embed.js, video.js for iframe wrappers; 404.html includes inline <style> block.

Checklist Item: Accessible names for interactive elements
Comments: Forms use explicit labels; modal close/search/carousel controls set aria-label; header navigation buttons include accessible names.

Checklist Item: Images with role='presentation' or aria-hidden='true' have empty alt; standalone without adjacent text and without alt flagged; hero/banner images verified to have non-empty alt >10 chars; in decorative containers verified to have empty alt or role='presentation'
Comments: No automated validation of decorative vs informative alt in block code; alt depends on authored content without runtime checks for empty/generic alt on hero images.

Checklist Item: Alt text is not a filename or path; not generic (image/photo/icon/picture/graphic/banner/logo without qualifier); between 5-125 characters; does not duplicate adjacent text content; does not begin with 'image of'/'picture of'/'photo of'; alt on linked images describes destination
Comments: No code-level alt quality rules (length, generic terms, filename patterns); authoring-only with no lint or runtime validation.

Checklist Item: Tables use thead and tbody
Comments: Table block builds semantic table with thead and tbody elements from block rows.

Checklist Item: Table headers use th

Checklist Item: Lists use ul or ol correctly
Comments: Default content and blocks preserve ul/ol from authored markup; form wizard uses ol for steps.
